_comment2: Push to GitHub → script auto-fetches on next execute.
_comment3: All image IDs are Roblox Asset IDs (upload at create.roblox.com → Decals).

RankAssets._comment: One icon per rank. Shown in the far-range icon badge.
RankAssets._comment2: BarTextureId = optional background image for the tag bar.

Owners._comment: ProfilePicId = custom circle pic override. Leave "" to use rank icon as pic.

CustomTags._comment: Per-user overrides. ProfilePicId overrides the rank icon in the circle pic.

Animations._comment: Glitch / Bounce / Scroll. Scroll is default.

Fonts._comment: Override name font. Options: GothamBlack, GothamBold, Gotham, Code, Arcade, Fantasy
